title: fix: dedupe and update Tomdacat app listing
author: voodoohop
pr_body_excerpt:
## Summary
- The Tomdacat entry in APPS.md was duplicated (identical row twice) and pointed at the old `tomdacat.com/ai-video-generator/` page.
- Updated to `ai.tomdacat.com` — the current platform: an OpenAI-compatible API for Roblox creators (chat/vision/image, 40+ models, Robux top-up), explicitly "Powered by Pollinations.ai."

## Test plan
- [x] Ran `node .github/scripts/app-update-greenhouse.js` to regenerate GREENHOUSE.md
- [x] Confirmed only one Tomdacat row remains in APPS.md

gist.headline: Roblox meets the hive
gist.blurb: We've refreshed the Tomdacat listing in our app directory! They're bringing Pollinations-powered AI to Roblox creators with over 40 models and Robux top-ups.
gist.summary: Deduplicated the Tomdacat entry in APPS.md and updated the link to ai.tomdacat.com, an OpenAI-compatible API for Roblox creators.
gist.impact: Community members exploring the app directory will now be directed to Tomdacat's current platform, showcasing how Pollinations powers 40+ models for Roblox developers.
gist.visual_concept: Polly the bee interacting with a blocky, voxel-style cat character (representing Roblox and Tomdacat), building a digital world together.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of Polly the bee mascot and a chunky voxel-style cat character building a digital blocky world together. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and pastel lavender gradient background. Warm lighting, lo-fi 8-bit aesthetic like Stardew Valley. Nostalgic but beautiful, emotionally warm.

image.prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of Polly the bee mascot and a chunky voxel-style cat character building a digital blocky world together. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and pastel lavender gradient background. Warm lighting, lo-fi 8-bit aesthetic like Stardew Valley. Nostalgic but beautiful, emotionally warm.
